2.rule: Draw green static pixels and one to eight green cornerless pot frames, turn each latent pot interior yellow, then perform one row-major four-neighbor surrounded-fill pass.
2.identifiability: Not an input-only function: two positive-probability latent parameterizations can produce byte-identical inputs but different outputs.

12.rule: On the fixed 12x12 grid, expand each of two colored plus markers to the exact radius-2 axial/diagonal stencil, then apply one of four gravity orientations.
12.finite_support: Complete 392-case generator parameter domain and all 1,712 sub-710 one-node Conv geometries were previously checked; no strict-lower exact geometry exists.

107.rule: Infer factor=len(unique edge colors)+1, scale the 5x5 colored pattern by that factor, and draw expanding red corner markers around the scaled 2x2 box.
107.caveat: The exact historical family deliberately uses 50..68-input monolithic Einsum and inherited shape cloaks; fresh correctness does not satisfy this lane's SOUND policy.
